summary: The protagonist receives a diplomatic mission to the Yushin Empire, acquiring essential supplies and maps for the journey. While dining with an elder brother figure, he discusses his intention to investigate the dangerous Nine Heavens Sect and the mysterious Heaven's Pavilion. Upon visiting the Sunghwa Sect head, he obtains a quest to uncover the secrets of the Nine Heavens, leading him to discover that his own Heavenly Demon Sect base has been destroyed, leaving behind only a mysterious clue.
key_moments: The protagonist secures travel supplies and official documents for his journey to the Yushin Empire.
A discussion with an elder brother reveals the potential link between the Heaven's Pavilion and the hostile Nine Heavens Sect.
The protagonist accepts a high-grade quest to investigate the Nine Heavens Sect and discovers his sect headquarters has been destroyed.
